component.name: ChatGPT Work Linux (Unofficial)
component.summary: Community Linux compatibility build for the unified ChatGPT Work application

description.p: ChatGPT Work Linux adapts the portable application plane from a locally supplied official ChatGPT artifact with a Wayland-first Electron runtime, Linux app-server integration, plugins, Sites, scheduled work, browser-use, and standard compositor window decorations.

This is an independent community project. It is not produced, supported, or endorsed by OpenAI. Builds are produced locally from a user-supplied artifact and are not redistributed by this project. The desktop icon is the unmodified official ChatGPT application icon; OpenAI owns the icon and all ChatGPT marks.
Unified ChatGPT Work compatibility release for native Wayland Linux desktops.
